overallReviewerSummary.description: Explanation of what this section represents — consolidated audit-level summary covering compliance, issues, closure status, coverage, and risk distribution for reviewer assessment.

auditorExecutionDurationSummary.description: Explanation of what this section represents — auditor execution timeline analysis covering actual vs planned duration, submission delay, and start delay.

auditorEfficiencyRating.description: Explanation of what this section represents — auditor efficiency scoring based on planned vs actual audit duration.
